economic_notes: Forestry and logging operations significant. COVID-19 impacted forestry operations and remote work. Investments in Stuwix Resources Ltd. (12.5%) and Vermilion Forks Community Forest Corporation (33.3%) accounted for by modified equity method. BC FN Gaming Revenue Sharing LP participation. Mining and natural resource operations.
notes: Audit qualified due to absence of budget comparatives (not a financial misstatement). COVID-19 noted as impacting forestry operations. Six entities fully consolidated including K'tipx Logging Ltd., K'tipx Logging Limited Partnership, Chuchuwayha Forestry Ltd., Chuchuwayha Forestry Limited Partnership, Upper Similkameen Development Corporation, and 0628957 BC Ltd. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity: Stuwix Resources Ltd. and Vermilion Forks Community Forest Corporation. Restricted cash details in notes but balance sheet amount not separately disclosed in extracted text. Capital lease obligations of $160,028 exist in addition to long-term debt. Annual debt service reflects long-term debt repayments only; capital lease repayments were an additional $136,919. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($668,147) + Other government per segment ($1,402,822) = $2,071,969. OSR calculated as total revenue minus total government transfers.
